title: scutellaria angrenica
intro: Scutellaria angrenica is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, commonly known as a type of skullcap. It is native to the Altai Mountains in Russia, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and protecting against oxidative damage. Scutellaria angrenica can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
